# Stable Serum

## Description

Retain your Hand for 2 turns.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Save for boss/elite turns where retaining a key attack, block card, or setup card across draw cycles prevents a bad hand or enables lethal.
